auth.label: CMS Token
auth.description: Plasmic CMS token sent with the x-plasmic-api-cms-tokens header. Find the CMS ID, public token, and secret token on the CMS Settings tab: https://docs.plasmic.app/learn/plasmic-cms-api-reference/#find-your-cms-ids-public-token-and-secret-token.

extraFields.label: CMS ID
extraFields.description: The Plasmic CMS ID used as the first part of the x-plasmic-api-cms-tokens header. Copy it from the CMS Settings tab: https://docs.plasmic.app/learn/plasmic-cms-api-reference/#find-your-cms-ids-public-token-and-secret-token.

actions.name: count_items
actions.description: Count rows in a Plasmic CMS model using the same q query filters, draft mode, and locale selection as list_items.

modelId.description: The Plasmic CMS model ID, such as testimonials, copied from the model schema page.

query.description: A Plasmic CMS query object serialized into the q query parameter. Use official keys such as where, limit, and offset.

draft.description: Whether to pass draft=1 and load draft or unpublished rows. This requires a secret CMS token.

locale.description: The CMS locale tag used for localized fields, such as ar-JO.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading rows from one Plasmic CMS model.

count.description: The number of rows matching the requested Plasmic CMS query.

outputSchema.description: The row count returned by the Plasmic CMS count endpoint.

actions.name: list_items
actions.description: List rows from a Plasmic CMS model with optional q query filters, draft mode, and locale selection.

modelId.description: The Plasmic CMS model ID, such as testimonials, copied from the model schema page.

query.description: A Plasmic CMS query object serialized into the q query parameter. Use official keys such as where, limit, and offset.

draft.description: Whether to pass draft=1 and load draft or unpublished rows. This requires a secret CMS token.

locale.description: The CMS locale tag used for localized fields, such as ar-JO.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading rows from one Plasmic CMS model.

createdAt.description: The time Plasmic created the row.

updatedAt.description: The time Plasmic last updated the row.

anyOf.description: The row identifier configured for the model.

additionalProperties.description: A model-defined Plasmic CMS field value.

anyOf.description: Model-defined Plasmic CMS field values for a row.

additionalProperties.description: A model-defined Plasmic CMS field value.

anyOf.description: Model-defined Plasmic CMS field values for a row.

items.description: A Plasmic CMS row with stable system fields and model-defined data preserved.

rows.description: Rows returned for the requested model query.

outputSchema.description: Rows returned by the Plasmic CMS query endpoint.
